videos.headline: Humphreys' impressive catch sets up a Frazier rushing TD
videos.description: London Humphreys make a spectacular catch which lays the platform for a Nate Frazier rushing touchdown for the Bulldogs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Humphreys' impressive catch sets up a Frazier rushing TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miles Kitselman goes airborne for a Tennessee TD
videos.description: Miles Kitselman puts on his cape and dives across the goal line to put the Volunteers on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miles Kitselman goes airborne for a Tennessee TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee's electric punt return sets up Turbyville's career-long 52-yard FG
videos.description: Boo Carter returns the punt into Bulldogs territory, then Josh Turbyville drills a career-high 52-yarder to pad the Volunteers' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee's electric punt return sets up Turbyville's career long 52 yard FG) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck fires a strike to Oscar Delp for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Oscar Delp hauls in a dime from Carson Beck to put the Bulldogs on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck fires a strike to Oscar Delp for a Georgia TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck teams up with wide-open Oscar Delp for 2nd TD
videos.description: Oscar Delp snags a dime from Carson Beck for their second pitch-and-catch touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck teams up with wide-open Oscar Delp for 2nd TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson breaks free for a 27-yard Tennessee TD
videos.description: Dylan Sampson outruns the Bulldogs' defense for a 27-yard Volunteers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Sampson breaks free for a 27-yard Tennessee TD) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia recovers the fumble to seal the win over Tennessee
videos.description: Damon Wilson II recovers the fumble by Nico Iamaleava to secure the win for the Bulldogs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia recovers the fumble to seal the win over Tennessee) 2024/11/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee Volunteers vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights
videos.description: Tennessee Volunteers vs. Georgia Bulldogs: Full Highlights
